description.value:
• Action Cost: 1 [Combat] action
  • Range: Touch or Self
  • Frequency: Once per short rest
  • Effect: Heal yourself or touched ally for HP equal to Charisma × tier. Life borrowed is life shared. Your pact allows you to channel positive energy through desperation.

system.effect: Heal yourself or touched ally for HP equal to Charisma × tier. Life borrowed is life shared. Your pact allows you to channel positive energy through desperation.
